title: PM Lane 219 - Project Miner Field-Start Clarification Return Closeout And Next-Packet Selection
scope: Define how returned Project Miner field-start clarification is classified.
Select safe next-packet options without assuming returned clarification exists.
Preserve approval, import, assignment, field, customer, production, and finance write boundaries.
Exercise dual-lane orchestration through bounded review only.

technical_authority_disposition: Adopt the sidecar label as the formal repo decision label.
Keep UI scan-burden review gated to a concrete Jason-identified scan-burden issue.
Default next safe packet to PM Lane 220 Project Miner Source Context Refresh No-Live Packet unless the classifier lands on HOLD_NO_LIVE.
